title: Z Any Device Manager — AI capsule (trust classification, read-only posture)
scope_note: Docs + metadata + read-only checks first. No real device connection, no network scanning, no antivirus replacement, no secrets, no deploy, no driver install, no NAS mutation.
law: Detect / declare / classify / recommend / report only from declared metadata.
No automatic device connection, no LAN or host scanning, no file-system introspection beyond operator-declared fields.
No antivirus or security product claims; hub posture is governance and documentation, not endpoint protection.
No driver install, no port opening, no production Cloudflare bind, no deployment automation from this capsule.
No secrets in registry; operators redact serials and tokens before any future ingest path exists.

device_identity_fields.name: device_id
device_identity_fields.description: Stable opaque identifier chosen by operator (not hardware serial in clear text unless policy allows).

device_identity_fields.name: device_type
device_identity_fields.description: Laptop, desktop, phone, tablet, SBC, NAS, router, unknown, etc.

device_identity_fields.name: os
device_identity_fields.description: Operating system family and version label as declared by operator.

device_identity_fields.name: cpu
device_identity_fields.description: CPU model or class as declared (optional coarse string).

device_identity_fields.name: gpu
device_identity_fields.description: GPU model or integrated/discrete flag as declared.

device_identity_fields.name: storage
device_identity_fields.description: Approximate local storage posture as declared (no volume enumeration).

device_identity_fields.name: network_capability
device_identity_fields.description: Declared capability label only: offline, local_only, internet_optional, tethered, etc. Not a live probe result.

device_identity_fields.name: trusted_status
device_identity_fields.description: Trust state from trust_states; operator-set or derived later only via approved read-only rules.

device_identity_fields.name: risk_signal
device_identity_fields.description: Optional advisory rollup aligned with trust_states or indicator-style posture (no auto-quarantine execution).

device_identity_fields.name: ecosystem_role
device_identity_fields.description: Role from ecosystem_roles; drives safe use-case hints and doc routing, not runtime authority.

trust_states.meaning: Declared posture matches hub policy; safe for listed cockpit or dashboard read-only use.
Elevated caution; human review before expanded role or new surfaces.
Sequencing or governance hold; documentation and checklist work only until cleared.
Do not treat as trusted for sensitive workflows; no automatic expansion of capability.
Unknown or policy-conflicted device class; no assumed trust; no connect authority.
NAS-adjacent or cold-mirror path not verified; no NAS mutation from this device class in this phase.

ecosystem_roles.label: Z-SSWS cockpit node
ecosystem_roles.description: Operator device used only to open SSWS-aligned dashboards, tasks, and read-only reports; no auto-bridge to production.

ecosystem_roles.label: Z-Lab supervised analysis node
ecosystem_roles.description: Device used under Z-Lab discipline for supervised analysis, scripts, and docs; no silent cross-repo bridges.

ecosystem_roles.label: Cloudflare preview controller
ecosystem_roles.description: Context for preview or edge posture review only; no device access, no secrets, no production deployment from capsule logic.

ecosystem_roles.label: NAS cold mirror candidate
ecosystem_roles.description: Hardware posture eligible for future cold-mirror compare-only workflows; remains NAS_WAIT until mount and human verify gates.

ecosystem_roles.label: dashboard display node
ecosystem_roles.description: Screen/browser surface for HODP-style read-only visualization; GET JSON and static assets only unless separately chartered.

ecosystem_roles.label: local AI inference node
ecosystem_roles.description: Declared capability for local or IDE-bound inference; Casa or Cursor may suggest prompts; no device authority from registry alone.

ecosystem_roles.label: quarantine / unknown device
ecosystem_roles.description: Unclassified or revoked trust; registry may list for awareness only; no connect or expand actions.

z_ssws_integration.description: Any Device Manager is a trust-classification and capability declaration layer consumed by SSWS doctrine; SSWS does not gain new execution hooks from this JSON alone.

synthetic_examples.note: Synthetic row for schema illustration only.
Synthetic; operator must classify before role expansion.
